title: Tests adicionales: cobertura de sessionStatus refreshing, cookie restore, cross-tab login, gating de reconciler
description: Follow-up de react-identity-access-9ze. Cierra 7 gaps de cobertura identificados.
close_reason: 7 tests adicionales agregados: sessionStatus refreshing observable, cookie session restore (con y sin tokens previos), HttpService 401 retry transitions, storage event con nuevos tokens, cross-tab reconciler gated by bootstrapDone, ensureValidSession dedup. 407/407 verdes.

title: SessionManager: state machine + bootstrap activo + cross-tab
description: Fix bug del 'estado trunco' donde AuthProvider expone isAuthReady=true + isAuthenticated=false antes de intentar refresh. Plan: /Users/fer/.claude/plans/necesitamos-resolver-esto-api-lucky-thunder.md. Cambios: globalThis registry, ensureValidSession activo, useSyncExternalStore reactivity, storage event listener cross-tab, logout vs expired flag, sessionStatus enum.
close_reason: Implementado: state machine, ensureValidSession activo, useSyncExternalStore reactividad, storage event listener cross-tab, globalThis registry, logout vs expired flag. 31 tests nuevos (bootstrap + crossTab + state), 400/400 tests verdes, build OK.

title: [frontend] Merge PR #21 (types-first exports); fix the require condition + publishConfig; ship the official AuthenticatedApiProvider; flatten coverage thresholds
description:
**Source analysis:** docs/analyses/2026-06-11-fleet-standardization-audit.md
**Standard:** docs/standards/lib-dual-build.md (new)
**What:** Findings F24, F14, F25, X15: the RIA→RPK bridge is hand-rolled 8 times across 6 repos with no lib export; PR #21 (types-first) MERGEABLE-but-blocked a month; require condition broken (CJS as .js in type:module); Vitest 3 global:{} thresholds no-op while the caller declares coverage-floor:90.
**How:** Merge #21 (review + OSV rerun); ship <AuthenticatedApiProvider> modeled on noten's 38-LOC interceptor provider with props a superset of resuelto's inline config; fileName cjs→.cjs + publishConfig.registry + smoke-dual; flatten thresholds; document both provider orders (canonical app + noten M4 backoffice) for the MCP guide. Release as minor; consumers migrate per the F24 tiering (resuelto last, same tree position).
**Verification:** require() loads; provider adopted in one canary repo (fisto/idachu drop-in); coverage gate actually fails on a planted drop.

title: Rename type-check → typecheck; populate empty husky stub
